Fleece Performance Engineering is a leading manufacturer of aftermarket diesel performance products. With a reputation for innovation, quality, and service, our products push the limits of diesel performance technology.  Products such as the Cheetah line of Turbochargers, the TapShifter, and the TurboBrake have established Fleece Performance as an industry innovator.
